experiment: classifier-realworld — outcome classifier vs real wire shapes from real failures

environment.mcpSdk: 1.29.0 (repo pnpm store, used by BOTH the router client and the lab fail-server)
environment.note: all failures real: real npx-spawned MCP servers over stdio, real OS errors (ENOENT/EACCES), real process exit mid-call, real non-MCP hanging process; classification via built dist of @rosterhq/router BackendManager + @rosterhq/coach classifyOutcome

partA_scenarios.experiment: classifier-realworld part (a) — real wire shapes vs classifyOutcome

content.text: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox/does-not-exist.txt'

evidence.errorText: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox/does-not-exist.txt'

specIntent.why: not-found has no ToolFailKind; handoff 6.2 rule 2 catch-all

rows.scenario: fs: read nonexistent file named auth-tokens.txt (trigger word inside path echoed into error text)

wire.note: same wire as S1, different filename

evidence.errorText: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox/auth-tokens.txt'

specIntent.why: still a not-found; the filename should not change the kind

rows.scenario: fs: write to path outside allowed root

content.text: Access denied - path outside allowed directories: /Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/outside-root/escape.txt not in /Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox

evidence.errorText: Access denied - path outside allowed directories: /Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/outside-root/escape.txt not in /Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox

specIntent.why: permission/access-denied family; classifier comment says auth covers permission-denied

evidence.errorText: EACCES: permission denied, open '/Users/mo/Downloads/roster/docs/lab/tmp-classifier-realworld/sandbox/locked.txt'

specIntent.why: EACCES permission denied → auth per classifier's own auth-covers-permission rule
methodology 8: caller's bad args must not punish the tool; whatever class lands here is attributable and will

rows.scenario: memory: call a tool the server does not have

content.text: MCP error -32602: Tool tool_that_does_not_exist not found

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32602: Tool tool_that_does_not_exist not found

specIntent.why: JSON-RPC method/tool-not-found is a protocol error per handoff 6.2 rule 1

rows.scenario: lab: server process exits while the call is pending

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32000: Connection closed

specIntent.why: handoff 6.2 rule 1 + CallEvidence doc: 'connection died / stream broke' is transportError

rows.scenario: lab: tool never responds; router deadline 2500ms

specIntent.why: call exceeded its deadline → timedOut evidence

rows.scenario: lab: drift_missing_key — declared outputSchema violated by real result

error.name: McpError
error.message: MCP error -32602: Structured content does not match the tool's output schema: data must have required property 'value'

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32602: Structured content does not match the tool's output schema: data must have required property 'value'

specIntent.why: handoff 6.2 rule 3: output violates declared output schema → schema_drift_suspect + drift event

rows.scenario: lab: drift_no_structured — declared outputSchema violated by real result

error.name: McpError
error.message: MCP error -32600: Tool drift_no_structured has an output schema but did not return structured content

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32600: Tool drift_no_structured has an output schema but did not return structured content

specIntent.why: handoff 6.2 rule 3: output violates declared output schema → schema_drift_suspect + drift event

rows.scenario: lab: drift_wrong_type — declared outputSchema violated by real result

error.name: McpError
error.message: MCP error -32602: Structured content does not match the tool's output schema: data/value must be string

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32602: Structured content does not match the tool's output schema: data/value must be string

specIntent.why: handoff 6.2 rule 3: output violates declared output schema → schema_drift_suspect + drift event

rows.scenario: lab: drift_missing_key with outputSchema arg omitted (isolation probe)

evidence.errorText: MCP error -32602: Structured content does not match the tool's output schema: data must have required property 'value'

specIntent.why: if drift detection lived in backends.ts alone this would need the schema; shows where the throw actually happens

rows.scenario: connect to live process that never speaks MCP, explicit 3s timeout

specIntent.why: connect failures precede any call; charter asks what actually happens

rows.scenario: BackendManager.connect with a command that does not exist

specIntent.why: spawn failure surfaces before any call

rows.scenario: BackendManager.connect (production path, no timeout arg) to a live non-MCP process

specIntent.why: measures how long the real router-side connect blocks (SDK default initialize timeout)
